string.text:
A compact personal defence weapon, designed as a close-combat weapon for special forces and law enforcement teams. It is designed with few parts for reliability, simplified maintenance and low cost. Highly maneuverable, with a high rate of fire and easy to control. Best suited for close combat.
 
 %c[pda_white]PROPERTIES: 
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Faction type: %c[ui_gray_2]Warsaw Pact
 %c[d_cyan] • %c[pda_white] Manufacturer: %c[ui_gray_2]KBP Instrument Design Bureau
